name: codex-read-aloud
description: Reads the latest Codex assistant response aloud on macOS.

interface.shortDescription: Speak Codex replies when a turn finishes.
interface.longDescription: Codex Read Aloud installs a local notify wrapper that preserves existing Codex notifications and speaks the newest assistant response from Codex session logs using macOS speech, with optional OpenAI TTS support.
